headline: RTX SPY-6 Radar Win Expands Naval Role And Long Term Appeal
summary: RTX (NYSE:RTX) secured a US$515 million contract from the U.S. Navy for its SPY-6 radar systems. The award expands deployment of SPY-6 across the Navy's fleet and selected allied governments. The contract marks a fresh step in RTX's role in advanced naval air and missile defense programs. For RTX, this SPY-6 win sits squarely in the core defense electronics and sensors business that many investors focus on when assessing the company. The contract adds to RTX's involvement in radar and...

headline: RTX Stock Rises After Catching an Upgrade. Why This Analyst Is Bullish.
summary: Shares of aerospace and defense conglomerate  RTX  rose early Thursday after catching a Wall Street upgrade.  On Thursday, Jefferies analyst Sheila Kahyaoglu upgraded RTX shares to Buy from Hold.  RTX stock rose 1.4% in premarket trading to $175, while  futures were down 0.6%.
